visual_features.overall_style: Modern, clean, conversion-focused hero layout with a semi-minimalist aesthetic. Uses a strong photographic/illustrative background (map of Romania with tech icons) overlaid by a dark gradient, contrasted with bright white and blue UI elements. Feels like a tech/startup directory rather than a corporate enterprise site.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Primary focal point is the large central headline in white, with a key phrase ('reparatii electronice') highlighted in blue, creating immediate emphasis on the service category. Directly beneath, the oversized search bar functions as the main interaction focus. Secondary hierarchy: the primary navigation and 'Adaugă Locație' CTA in the top-right, then the horizontal category shortcuts/icons beneath the search bar. The dimmed, low-contrast map background clearly sits behind the high-contrast foreground UI.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Hero content is centered with generous vertical padding, allowing the headline and search bar to breathe over the dark background. Inputs and buttons have ample internal padding and clear separation. The header bar is slim but uncluttered, with sufficient spacing between nav items. Overall whitespace is balanced: enough for clarity while still fitting multiple elements (headline, search bar, category shortcuts) in the first viewport.
unique_elements: Illustrated map background themed around electronics and locations (pins, controllers, devices)
Large, multi-field search bar acting as a central control panel (category select + location + CTA button in a single pill-like container)
Horizontal row of soft, pill-like category cards with simple line icons
Use of a darkened map overlay to visually anchor the hero without distracting from foreground text

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implicit 12-column desktop grid with a centered max-width content container (~1100–1200px). Nav, headline, search bar, and category pills all appear horizontally aligned to this central grid.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width hero with a fixed top navigation bar. Content is centered within the hero, with stacked vertical sections: headline, search bar, then horizontal category icons.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top persistent header for branding and navigation; below, a single dominant hero section containing the main proposition and search functionality. Within the hero: (1) large central headline text, (2) a wide search strip with multiple inputs, (3) a secondary strip of category shortcuts/icons.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Overall center alignment for hero content. Text in the headline is center-aligned. Navigation links are right-aligned within the header. Inside components, content tends to be left-aligned (input placeholders, icon labels) but arranged within horizontally centered containers. Vertical alignment of controls within the search bar is visually centered.
responsive_hints: Navigation items spaced enough to collapse into a hamburger on smaller viewports without crowding the logo.
Hero content uses a central column; likely stacks vertically on mobile (headline → search inputs stacked → categories in a scrollable row or grid).
Large touch-friendly hit areas (buttons and category pills) suggest mobile optimization.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: fixed header bar (logo left, nav links and CTA button right), then a full-width hero background image with a dark overlay. Inside the hero, content is vertically stacked and centered: a multi-line headline, followed by a horizontally arranged search module consisting of three main parts (category input with dropdown icon, location input, search CTA button). Beneath that, a horizontal row of rounded category cards, each with an icon and label, likely sitting in a semi-transparent or blurred pill-shaped container.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Hero occupies nearly the full initial viewport height. Within the hero, roughly the top 40% is occupied by the headline and top padding over the map; the middle ~30% is devoted to the large search bar; the lower ~20% contains the category shortcuts. The header bar at the top is relatively shallow but full-width. Foreground components (search bar, category row) are visually elevated above the background with spacing and subtle drop shadows, giving them prominence.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Moderately spacious layout. Key interactive elements (search bar and category pills) are large with generous padding, emphasizing clarity and ease of use. Text density is low in the hero (one main message, minimal supporting copy). Navigation is minimal with only a few primary links, avoiding clutter.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Strong vertical flow with an initial horizontal scan: eye starts top-left at the logo, moves across the main navigation to the right CTA, then drops to the central headline (large white text). From there, the eye moves straight downward to the bold, high-contrast search bar, then further down to the category shortcuts. The high-contrast blue words in the headline and the bright blue search button create secondary focal points that guide attention toward interaction.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Buttons are rounded rectangles with approximately 4–6px corner radius (slightly softened but not fully pill-shaped). Primary CTA buttons (e.g., 'Caută') use a solid bright blue background (#008CDA–#00AEEF) with white text, medium-to-bold weight. They have generous horizontal padding (around 16–24px) and moderate vertical padding (10–14px), resulting in a substantial clickable area. Outline buttons (e.g., '+ Adaugă Locație' in the header) use white background with a 1–2px blue border and blue text, maintaining the same radius and padding. Appearance is flat with minimal or very subtle shadow; focus is on color contrast rather than skeuomorphic depth.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Primarily implemented as ``.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Category cards beneath the search bar appear as horizontally oriented, pill-like containers with large border-radius (16–32px or more). They likely have a semi-translucent white or very light background over the dark hero image, possibly with a subtle drop shadow or blur effect to separate them from the map. Each card includes a simple, line-style icon centered above a short text label. Internal padding is generous, with clear breathing space around icon and label. Visual separation between cards is achieved via spacing rather than heavy borders.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Cards likely implemented as anchor elements or divs within a flexbox container: ` … Electronice `. The row uses flexbox with gap spacing. On mobile, these cards would wrap or become a horizontally scrollable list.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Form elements in the main search bar are embedded in a single horizontal, pill-shaped container with a white background. Individual input fields have no visible outer borders beyond the encompassing container; separation is created with thin vertical dividers or spacing. Inputs use light gray placeholder text and left-aligned content. One field includes a downward chevron/icon indicating a dropdown (for service category). The location input has a lighter placeholder label ('Orasul Tau') with a slightly darker preceding label 'Unde?'. Form controls appear large, with tall line-height and vertical padding for comfortable clicking/tapping. The overall look is flat and modern.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern:
Search form likely built as a `
` containing a container div with flex layout: `
`. Labels may be implemented as placeholder text or as subtle inline labels preceding placeholder text within the input container.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Top navigation is horizontal, positioned in a white bar across the top. Logo with icon and site name sits on the left; nav links ('Acasă', 'Blog', 'Contact', 'Sign In') are text-only links on the right, using blue font color. Links appear with ample horizontal spacing and likely change color or underline on hover. 'Adaugă Locație' is visually separated as an outlined button. Overall style is minimal, flat, and airy, with no heavy dividers—only the white bar against the darker hero background below.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern:
Structured as a `
` with a flex container: logo block on the left, navigation list on the right. Typical HTML: `
…
  • Acasă
    • …
+ Adaugă Locație
`. On small screens, the `ul` likely collapses into a hamburger menu (e.g., using a button that toggles a vertical menu).

ui_patterns.visual_description: The visible list-like pattern is the horizontal set of category shortcuts. Items are low-density, with clear spacing between each; each item contains an icon (monoline, simple, white or light against the darker pill background) and a label set in a small to medium sans-serif. Separator lines between items are not visible; instead, the combination of card shapes and spacing defines each element. The design hints that service listings deeper in the site may be represented as cards or rows with similar icon/label hierarchy.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern:
HTML likely uses a flex row of list items or direct children: `
  • …
    • …
` or `
……
`. Each item is a flex/column container aligning icon at top and text beneath.

heading.visual_style: Bold geometric/humanist sans-serif with high x-height, uniform stroke widths, and rounded curves. The large hero headline is heavy and clean, optimized for legibility over an image background.

body.visual_style: Neutral, clean sans-serif suitable for UI labels, navigation, and form placeholders. Likely a humanist/grotesque style with good readability at small sizes.

spacing_system.component_padding: Buttons and inputs: 8–12px vertical, 16–24px horizontal. Cards and category pills: 16–24px internal padding. Search bar container: ~16px internal padding with gaps (~8–16px) between internal fields.
spacing_system.section_margin: Hero top/bottom padding around 64–96px on desktop. Vertical spacing between stacked elements (headline → search bar → categories) at ~24–32px. Future sections likely separated by 48–64px margins.

interaction_hints: Buttons likely use hover states with slight darkening or lightening of the blue, plus possible box-shadow enhancement or subtle scale-up (1.02x). Outline buttons probably invert or fill with blue on hover.
Navigation links probably change color from standard blue to a darker blue or gain an underline on hover; active page may show persistent underline or a slightly bolder weight.
Search inputs likely get a subtle shadow, border highlight, or inner glow in blue when focused, signaling active fields.
Category cards may lift slightly on hover (elevation via shadow), possibly with icon or label color change to brighter blue or white.
Transitions should be smooth and fast (150–250ms) using CSS ease-out or ease-in-out, emphasizing responsiveness without feeling sluggish.
